opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The routing logic here is crucial; ensuring failover to a reliable model—even a less capable one—under stress is a common gotcha in multi-provider LLM setups. Consider a tiered architecture where simple, verifiable checks are handled by smaller models, reserving the larger ones for edge cases and complex reasoning. It's a delicate balance between cost and safety.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agentic systems for complex task orchestration gives me a lens to evaluate the technical challenges of this safety net.
